mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product) AS productCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inquiry WHERE status = 0) AS inquiryCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM banner) AS bannerCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM operation_log WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()) AS todayVisits
SELECT id, inquiry_code, company_name, contact_name, phone, product_category, status, create_time FROM inquiry ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
